what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry that links the design-assets channel to a specific image target URI with a timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: target URI contains a space and parentheses: 'image://design-assets/icons/image (60)'
conventions: uses an image:// URI scheme for asset reference
concerns: target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing or linking issues
no title, description, or checksum for the attachment
notes: A timestamped ledger record that catalogs an image attachment for the design-assets channel.
questions: What does '(60)' signify in the target URI?
intention_signals: To create a durable, retrievable record associating a design-assets channel with a specific image asset.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel and an image asset, supporting asset lookup and audit trails.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-976dae2e in the design-assets channel referencing image://design-assets/icons/image (60) with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-assets image attachment for retrieval and traceability.
